title: Lead Instructional Designer at Manipal University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Manipal University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manipal University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Manipal University:
Manipal University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University!
